base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of subweapon_holy_water — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Holy Water — thrown down + flame-pool on impact. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Holy Water — thrown down + flame-pool on impact; 3-frame. Kills most enemies in 1 hit
